
## Reference Code

```r
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Biobase)
  library(genefilter)
})

counts_path <- file.path("inputs", "counts.tsv")
if (!file.exists(counts_path)) {
  stop("counts.tsv input missing")
}

counts_df <- read.delim(counts_path, check.names = FALSE, row.names = 1)
expr_mat <- as.matrix(counts_df)
keep_expr <- rowMeans(expr_mat) >= 5
expr_mat <- expr_mat[keep_expr, , drop = FALSE]
if (nrow(expr_mat) == 0) {
  stop("All genes filtered out by expression threshold >= 5")
}

pheno_dummy <- data.frame(sample = colnames(expr_mat), row.names = colnames(expr_mat))
feature_dummy <- data.frame(gene_id = rownames(expr_mat), row.names = rownames(expr_mat))
eset <- ExpressionSet(
  assayData = expr_mat,
  phenoData = AnnotatedDataFrame(pheno_dummy),
  featureData = AnnotatedDataFrame(feature_dummy)
)
annotation(eset) <- "synthetic"

nf <- nsFilter(
  eset,
  require.entrez = FALSE,
  require.GOBP = FALSE,
  require.GOCC = FALSE,
  require.GOMF = FALSE,
  require.CytoBand = FALSE,
  remove.dupEntrez = FALSE,
  var.func = IQR,
  var.cutoff = 0.25,
  var.filter = TRUE,
  filterByQuantile = FALSE,
  feature.exclude = character(0),
  filterFun = NULL
)
filtered_eset <- nf$eset

outputs_dir <- "outputs"
dir.create(outputs_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
write.table(exprs(filtered_eset), file = file.path(outputs_dir, "filtered_counts.tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, col.names = NA)

report <- list(
  total_genes = nrow(expr_mat),
  kept_genes = nrow(exprs(filtered_eset)),
  filtered_lowVar = nf$filter.log$varFilter,
  filtered_lowExpression = nf$filter.log$featureFilter
)
jsonlite::write_json(report, file.path(outputs_dir, "filter_report.json"), auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE)
```

## Biomni Code

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# GF103_nsfilter workflow for genefilter package
# This script reproduces the reference workflow for filtering genes

# Load required packages
library(Biobase)
library(genefilter)
library(jsonlite)

# Create outputs directory
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Read input data
cat("Reading input data from 'inputs/counts.tsv'...\n")
counts_data <- read.table("inputs/counts.tsv", 
                         header = TRUE, 
                         row.names = 1, 
                         sep = "\t",
                         check.names = FALSE)

cat("Input data dimensions:", dim(counts_data), "\n")
cat("Number of genes:", nrow(counts_data), "\n")
cat("Number of samples:", ncol(counts_data), "\n")

# Convert to matrix
expression_matrix <- as.matrix(counts_data)

# Create ExpressionSet object
cat("\nCreating ExpressionSet object...\n")
eset <- ExpressionSet(assayData = expression_matrix)

# Apply nsFilter
cat("Applying nsFilter...\n")
# Using default parameters similar to the reference workflow
# Note: For real data, you might want to adjust parameters based on your needs
filter_result <- nsFilter(
  eset,
  require.entrez = FALSE,      # We don't have Entrez IDs in our data
  require.GOBP = FALSE,        # Don't require GO annotations
  require.GOCC = FALSE,
  require.GOMF = FALSE,
  require.CytoBand = FALSE,
  remove.dupEntrez = FALSE,    # No Entrez IDs to check for duplicates
  var.filter = TRUE,           # Apply variance filter
  var.func = IQR,              # Use IQR for variability measure
  var.cutoff = 0.5,            # Cutoff for variability
  filterByQuantile = TRUE,     # Interpret cutoff as quantile
  feature.exclude = "^AFFX"    # Exclude AFFX control probes
)

# Extract filtered ExpressionSet
filtered_eset <- filter_result$eset

# Get filter log
filter_log <- filter_result$filter.log

cat("\nFiltering results:\n")
cat("Original number of genes:", nrow(eset), "\n")
cat("Filtered number of genes:", nrow(filtered_eset), "\n")
cat("Number of genes removed:", nrow(eset) - nrow(filtered_eset), "\n")

# Extract expression data from filtered ExpressionSet
filtered_counts <- exprs(filtered_eset)

# Write filtered counts to TSV file
cat("\nWriting filtered counts to 'outputs/filtered_counts.tsv'...\n")
write.table(filtered_counts,
            file = "outputs/filtered_counts.tsv",
            sep = "\t",
            quote = FALSE,
            col.names = NA)  # Include row names as first column

# Prepare filter report for JSON output
report <- list(
  input_summary = list(
    file = "inputs/counts.tsv",
    n_genes = nrow(eset),
    n_samples = ncol(eset),
    sample_names = colnames(eset)
  ),
  filtering_parameters = list(
    require_entrez = FALSE,
    require_GOBP = FALSE,
    require_GOCC = FALSE,
    require_GOMF = FALSE,
    require_CytoBand = FALSE,
    remove_dupEntrez = FALSE,
    var_filter = TRUE,
    var_func = "IQR",
    var_cutoff = 0.5,
    filterByQuantile = TRUE,
    feature_exclude = "^AFFX"
  ),
  filtering_results = list(
    n_genes_original = nrow(eset),
    n_genes_filtered = nrow(filtered_eset),
    n_genes_removed = nrow(eset) - nrow(filtered_eset),
    percentage_removed = round((nrow(eset) - nrow(filtered_eset)) / nrow(eset) * 100, 2),
    filter_details = filter_log
  ),
  output_files = list(
    filtered_counts = "outputs/filtered_counts.tsv",
    filter_report = "outputs/filter_report.json"
  ),
  timestamp = Sys.time(),
  session_info = sessionInfo()
)

# Write filter report to JSON file
cat("Writing filter report to 'outputs/filter_report.json'...\n")
write_json(report, 
           path = "outputs/filter_report.json",
           pretty = TRUE,
           auto_unbox = TRUE)

# Quick check to ensure all expected output files are created
cat("\nVerifying output files...\n")
output_files <- c("outputs/filtered_counts.tsv", "outputs/filter_report.json")
files_exist <- file.exists(output_files)

if (all(files_exist)) {
  cat("✓ All output files created successfully:\n")
  for (file in output_files) {
    file_size <- file.size(file)
    cat(sprintf("  - %s (%.2f KB)\n", file, file_size/1024))
  }
} else {
  cat("✗ Some output files are missing:\n")
  for (i in seq_along(output_files)) {
    status <- ifelse(files_exist[i], "✓", "✗")
    cat(sprintf("  %s %s\n", status, output_files[i]))
  }
}

cat("\nWorkflow completed successfully!\n")
```
